name_cn:
Chanel 24b Pearl Chain Bag
In stock, full premium packaging
The new 24b small used bag is here, featuring a pearl chain design
Black metal, acrylic embellishments, full of high-class feel
Although it doesn't hold much, it looks very good when paired with outfits
Black and gold color scheme, undoubtedly high-class!
